businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) three-pillar system
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). NVIDIA sovereign AI DC co-announcement + GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas, World View, LG CNS mission-critical partnerships. Polymarket+TWG AI sports betting integrity platform announced. FY2026E EPS $1.02 (+62% YoY). Market cap $361.0B, P/E ~240x, Forward P/E ~148x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government Contracts: Gotham/Apollo — defense, intelligence agencies, NATO (~55% of revenue)
Commercial Contracts: Foundry/AIP — enterprise AI platform, Boot Camp strategy (~45% of revenue)
SaaS Model: Annual subscription + expansion-based. Net Dollar Retention 120%+

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme growth premium. Reflects monopolistic AI platform position

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $1.02. High but reflects +62% growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: SaaS model's high scalability. Industry-best level

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Stable cash generation. Achieving growth + profitability simultaneously

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue growth + profit margin = 114. SaaS elite tier

keyMetrics.name: US Commercial Revenue Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: AIP bootcamp → enterprise expansion strategy delivering explosively

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting Integrity Platform — Prediction Market AI Entry
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Building 'next-gen sports integrity platform' with Polymarket + TWG AI using Vergence AI engine. Suspicious trade monitoring and fraud detection. Opening a new TAM in prediction markets.

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA+Palantir Sovereign AI DC Architecture — Global AI Infrastructure
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI DC co-announcement. GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS adopting Palantir AIP + NVIDIA infrastructure.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnership Explosion — Defense, Energy, Aerospace
growthDrivers.description: BusinessWire (3/12): Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI) multi-year contracts.

growthDrivers.title: Alex Karp: AI 'Project Maven' Shifting Tide in US-Iran Conflict
growthDrivers.description: eand.co (3/13): Palantir CEO states Project Maven AI system plays critical role in defense operations. Real-world validation strengthens government contract expansion case.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government/defense AI track record. Security clearance is the entry barrier. 'Ontology' platform as the unique human-AI collaboration interface forms an unmatched moat.

moats.description: Top-level US DoD/intelligence agency security clearances. Competitors cannot enter.
The 'tool factory' for AI and human agents. Unmatched in battlefield planning and target identification.
5-day intensive pilot to win enterprise customers, then expand company-wide. High conversion rate.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Some overlap in analytics domain

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI competitor. Smaller scale and profitability

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Growing fast but much smaller than Palantir

recentNews.headline: Polymarket+Palantir+TWG AI Announce Sports Betting Integrity Platform
recentNews.significance: Barchart: Vergence AI engine for suspicious trade monitoring. New TAM entry into prediction markets and sports betting. BofA maintains positive view.

recentNews.headline: Mission-Critical AI Partnerships Change Palantir's Investment Story
recentNews.significance: Yahoo Finance: GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS adopt AIP. NVIDIA sovereign AI DC co-announcement.

recentNews.headline: Alex Karp: Project Maven AI Shifting Tide in US-Iran War
recentNews.significance: CEO's real-world validation statement. Defense AI's proven battlefield impact strengthens case for contract expansion.

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9 — Latest Customer Success Stories Revealed
recentNews.significance: BusinessWire: Ondas (drone ISR) + World View (stratospheric) strategic partnerships. Warp Speed platform supply chain/manufacturing integration.

recentNews.headline: Zacks: PLTR Among Most Searched Stocks — Investor Interest Surging
recentNews.significance: Zacks: One of the most searched stocks recently. EPS growth +62% YoY (FY2026E). Sustained investor attention.

analystOpinions.notableComment: StockAnalysis: 20 analysts Buy consensus, $193.75 (+28%). BofA: Maintains positive view. FY2026E EPS $1.02 (+62%), FY2027E $1.52 (+49%). Earnings growth acceleration is key to valuation justification.

risks.title: P/E 240x — Extreme Premium Valuation
risks.description: Highest level among SaaS companies. Despite +70% growth, valuation burden. Sharp downside risk if growth slows.

risks.title: Government Budget Dependency — Defense Spending Cut/Geopolitical Risk
risks.description: ~55% of revenue from government contracts. Iran war developments and administration changes could directly impact.

risks.title: ATH -27% Technical Correction + Below 50-Day MA
risks.description: Below 50-day MA at $162. YTD -14.7%. Momentum investor exits and profit-taking pressure.

risks.title: SBC (Stock-Based Compensation) — Dilution Concerns
risks.description: SBC represents significant portion of adjusted earnings. GAAP profitability may be overstated.

risks.title: CEO Alex Karp Image Risk
risks.description: As a defense AI company, subject to anti-war activist and ethical debates. ESG investor avoidance possible.

buyReasons.title: Polymarket Sports Integrity — Prediction Market TAM Pioneer
buyReasons.rationale: Vergence AI engine entry into prediction markets and sports betting. New revenue stream + AI application scope expansion.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI DC + Mission-Critical Partnership Explosion
buyReasons.rationale: GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas multi-year contracts. NVIDIA alliance for global AI infrastructure supply.

buyReasons.title: FY2026E EPS +62% Growth — Earnings Acceleration Inflection
buyReasons.rationale: EPS $1.02 → FY2027E $1.52 (+49%). Earnings growth gradually resolving valuation burden.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial +137% YoY — AIP Bootcamp Explosive Conversion
buyReasons.rationale: 5-day bootcamp → enterprise expansion strategy proven. Commercial revenue share growing, reducing defense dependency.

overallOpinion: Palantir is rapidly expanding AI application scope with Polymarket sports integrity + NVIDIA sovereign AI DC + mission-critical partnerships. Revenue +70%, US Commercial +137%.
FY2026E EPS $1.02 (+62%), FY2027E $1.52 (+49%) — earnings growth accelerating. BofA maintains positive view. But P/E 240x remains an extreme premium.
Below 50-day MA ($162) shows technical weakness but holds above 200-day ($120). ATH -27% correction is entry opportunity for long-term investors, but valuation risk management is essential.
